themes.title: Notification Criteria
themes.description: Establishing the foundational criteria for prioritizing notifications.

milestones.name: Define Notification Prioritization Criteria
milestones.description: Complete the definition of criteria for prioritizing notifications using machine learning.
milestones.success_criteria: Notification prioritization criteria are defined and documented, ready for implementation.

mvp.goal: Establish the foundational criteria for notification prioritization.

v1.goal: Implement the defined criteria into the notification system.

v2.goal: Enhance the system with advanced machine learning models for better prioritization.
